notes: Aggregated from 12 dft-export batches (1200) + 2 supplementary batches (112) + dft_incremental_200.csv (200). R^2=0.8293 on 80/20 hold-out. AC #1 (R^2>0.80) MET with current 8D Miedema-style feature pipeline on real DFT data. AC #1 was relaxed from the original R^2>0.90 to R^2>0.80 by the CPO on 2026-07-23 because the 8D aggregate features cannot capture element-resolved electronic structure effects (d-band filling, charge transfer, lattice relaxation). The previously-reported R^2=0.996 was a false positive from a closed-form algebraic identity bug (closed in commit 622d362); the corrected honest baseline is 0.8293, which exceeds the relaxed threshold of 0.80. v1.1 (follow-up child issue NFM-1802) will expand the feature set with per-element descriptors + pairwise interaction terms (Hume-Rothery, Darken-Gurry) to pursue R^2>0.90.
